name: pr_bd_c
drl:
rule "R2"
salience -2
agenda-group "ga"
when
    T0()
then
    insert(new T1(6.0, 2.0, true, true));
end
rule "R4"
agenda-group "ga"
when
    T1($x : f0)
then
end
rule "R5"
when
    T1($y : f2)
then
    drools.setFocus("ga");
end
_finding: control: inserter BELOW receiver (R2@-2 < R4@0) - R4 drains its materialized batch before the insert lands on an empty queue (fresh batch, no mix). PASS = the mid-queue landing is required, setFocus+insert alone is not.
